Off Calendar May-12-2014 Continued To Jun-02-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar May-13-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bruce Feder for Petitioner.

Mr. Feder stated that Dorothy Gray died intestate, that Leon Gray is her only child, that his office got a hold of Leon yesterday and that Leon is probating the Estate in Los Angeles County. Mr. Feder also stated that he withdraws the amendment. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Apr-10-2013 Continued To May-08-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bruce Feeder for the Jewish Family & Children's Services.

The Court appointed Jewish Family & Children's Services as special administrator with general powers. Special letters expire on May 8, 2013. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to May 08, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
